Entoplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Entoplastron fragment. [Contour]: The fragment has a rhomboid or diamond-shaped outline formed by jagged suture lines. [Pattern]: The surface features a cross-shaped (+) intersection of grooves.

Right Epiplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Right Epiplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is a smooth original curve, while the inner edges are jagged sutures. [Pattern]: It features a curved groove line sweeping downwards to the left.

Left Epiplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Left Epiplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is a smooth original curve, while the inner edges are jagged sutures. [Pattern]: It features a curved groove line sweeping downwards to the right.

Right Hyoplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Right Hyoplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top inner corner has a notch to fit the central diamond bone. The bottom edge is a straight horizontal suture line. [Pattern]: Characterized by horizontal texture, often showing two parallel groove lines.

Left Hyoplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Left Hyoplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top inner corner has a notch to fit the central diamond bone. The bottom edge is a straight horizontal suture line. [Pattern]: Characterized by horizontal texture, often showing two parallel groove lines.

Right Hypoplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Right Hypoplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is a straight horizontal suture line. The bottom edge is irregular or curved where it meets the tail bone. [Pattern]: Features a single horizontal groove line that forms a slightly backward-convex arc.

Left Hypoplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Left Hypoplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is a straight horizontal suture line. The bottom edge is irregular or curved where it meets the tail bone. [Pattern]: Features a single horizontal groove line that forms a slightly backward-convex arc.

Right Xiphiplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Right Xiphiplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is jagged, and the bottom tip is usually concave or pointed. [Pattern]: Features a groove line sloping steeply downwards to the right.

Left Xiphiplastron.prompt: A close-up of the Left Xiphiplastron fragment. [Contour]: The top edge is jagged, and the bottom tip is usually concave or pointed. [Pattern]: Features a groove line sloping steeply downwards to the left.
